_comment: Reviewed (ADR-007) lists of overseas destinations with NO known reprocessing capacity for a given UK packaging-waste material family. A load whose OSR_COUNTRY (column BJ, `osrCountry`) is on its material family's list is an implausible, Basel-relevant destination (docs/anomaly-scenarios-from-sample.md E2). Keyed on the NORMALISED material family — the part of DESCRIPTION_WASTE (column I) before the ' - ' grade separator, or the Cover `material` — so the check is per-material and never hard-coded to aluminium. `families` entries are authoritative for that family; `default` applies to any family with no specific entry. Country strings are matched case/format-insensitively (normalised like the country entity key), so 'Tuvalu-TV' matches 'tuvalu-tv'. Add a destination here only after reviewing that the country lacks reprocessing infrastructure for the material (OECD/Basel cross-reference).
